javax.xml.transform.stream/StreamSource/.name: FEATURE
javax.xml.transform.stream/StreamSource/.description:
IfTransformerFactory.getFeature(String)returns true when passed this value as an argument,
 the Transformer supports Source input of this type.

javax.xml.transform.stream/StreamResult/.name: FEATURE
javax.xml.transform.stream/StreamResult/.description:
IfTransformerFactory.getFeature(String)returns true when passed this value as an argument,
 the Transformer supports Result output of this type.
